user.title: Discover public datasets
user.description: Enter an institution's public data portal URL. Open Data will detect the provider and rank useful datasets automatically. Large portals may take tens of seconds to scan.

discover.title: Choose discovered datasets
discover.description: Found {count} ranked datasets on {portal} using {provider}. Scores favor queryable environmental, weather, air-quality, water, climate, and energy data.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the portal.
error.invalid_dataset: The portal or selected dataset is invalid.
error.no_datasets: No suitable queryable datasets were discovered on this portal.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This open data resource is already configured.

init.title: Choose dataset structure
init.description: Dataset structure: {kind}. Current identity field: {identity}. First choose which fields identify the physical record or location and its observation time. Record choices will be rebuilt on the next screen.

records.title: Choose records and metrics
records.description: Record choices were rebuilt using {identity} as the identity for this {kind} dataset. Historical observation IDs should not be selected as locations.
